title: Loyalty Challenge Accumulator Item Entry
description: A single element in accumulators item_list for a loyalty challenge task or completion, including item details, identifiers, and timestamps.

xdm:item.title: Item
xdm:item.description: Item details for this accumulator entry.

xdm:item_set.title: Item Set
xdm:item_set.description: Properties or tags of the item.

xdm:unit_price.title: Unit Price
xdm:unit_price.description: Price per unit of the item.

xdm:sub_total.title: Subtotal
xdm:sub_total.description: Subtotal for this line (for example quantity multiplied by unit price).

xdm:_id.title: Identifier
xdm:_id.description: Unique identifier for this accumulator list entry.

xdm:timestampApplied.title: Timestamp Applied
xdm:timestampApplied.description: When this entry was applied to accumulators.

xdm:utcOffset.title: UTC Offset
xdm:utcOffset.description: Local UTC offset for the contributing event (for example -08:00).

xdm:locationId.title: Location ID
xdm:locationId.description: Identifier for the location where the contributing transaction occurred.

xdm:transactionId.title: Transaction ID
xdm:transactionId.description: Transaction associated with this accumulator entry.
